_comment: Canonical map of all AI API models used across live-css. Referenced by model-context.json files in each subdirectory. Costs are USD per 1K tokens. Updated: 2026-03-03.

use_cases: streaming file-edit agent (rewrites complete source files in-place)
project mode executor (applies per-file edit steps sequentially)
agent run handler preview task (via prompts.json model_override)
claude-haiku-4-5-20251001.flow: user instruction -> agent.py / project_mode.py -> Haiku streams full file content -> written back to disk

use_cases: default provider model for Anthropic in config (not yet wired to a specific feature)
claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929.flow: available via ai/anthropic.php SSE endpoint when model is passed in POST body

use_cases: listed in Anthropic models catalog for future use
claude-sonnet-4-6.flow: available via ai/anthropic.php when specified by caller

use_cases: listed in Anthropic models catalog for future use
claude-opus-4-6.flow: available via ai/anthropic.php when specified by caller

use_cases: tech-slang running commentary sidebar while Haiku edits (convo.py)
project planner -- parses file tree + instruction, returns JSON edit plan
phrases.db seeding -- generates 60 ai-working phrases on demand
agent-flow ai-call default model for workflow steps
debug-tool AI analyzer
gpt-4o-mini.flow: convo.py: starts in daemon thread alongside Haiku, drip-feeds commentary lines via callback to TUI log panel. project_mode.py ProjectPlanner: receives file tree outline, returns {prompt, phrases} JSON for executor. phrases.php: one-shot call to populate phrases.db when table has fewer than 30 rows.

use_cases: default provider model for OpenAI in config (not yet wired to a specific feature)
gpt-4o.flow: available via OpenAI SDK when model is specified by caller

use_cases: listed in OpenAI models catalog for future use
gpt-4-turbo.flow: available via OpenAI SDK when specified by caller

use_cases: listed in OpenAI models catalog, kept for legacy fallback
gpt-3.5-turbo.flow: available via OpenAI SDK when specified by caller

use_cases: listed in OpenAI models catalog for future use
gpt-5.1.flow: available via OpenAI SDK when specified by caller

use_cases: listed in OpenAI models catalog for future use
gpt-5.2.flow: available via OpenAI SDK when specified by caller

use_cases: primary DeepSeek SSE streaming endpoint (ai/deepseek.php)
provider test suite (ai/test-providers.php)
debug-tool AI analyzer (callDeepSeek)
deepseek-chat.flow: client sends POST with messages array to ai/deepseek.php -> handler reads api_key from config -> streams response via SSE. Uses /chat/completions route (OpenAI-compatible). Reasoning content from deepseek-reasoner is surfaced separately if present.

use_cases: listed in DeepSeek models catalog, reasoning/chain-of-thought tasks
deepseek-reasoner.flow: available via ai/deepseek.php when model is passed in POST body. reasoning_content is surfaced separately.

emi-bio-inspired.description: EMI bio-inspired 512-channel BCI model with 370K-word lexicon. Performs mood scoring via chunk-based analysis. No API key, no network call.
use_cases: mood analysis of text (stdin, file, or --addon one-sentence mode)
chunk-based sentiment/emotion scoring with match_rate weighting
emi-bio-inspired.flow: mood_check.py reads text (stdin or --file) -> splits into chunks (default 250 words, 30 overlap) -> passes each chunk to EMIEngine.analyze() -> aggregates scores by match_rate weight -> prints dominant mood + top patterns + valence/arousal
